tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_parquet('data/gsm8k/train_256.parquet')
print('Columns:', list(df.columns))
print('Shape:', df.shape)
print()
print('First row sample:')
for col in df.columns:
    val = str(df.iloc[0][col])
    print(f'  {col}: {val[:200]}')
"

tool_input.args: 初始配置 | backend=verl | 训练需求摘要：任务类型: math, 模型: Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct, 数据集: gsm8k, 数据集路径: data/gsm8k, 数据规模: 256 problems, GPU: 4卡, 训练参数: 2 epochs, lr=1e-6, num_generations=8, temperature=0.7, 训练目标: avg reward >= 0.8, 停止条件: 达标/连续3轮无提升/最多5轮

{
  "model_name": "/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct",

  "seed": 46,
  "dataset_path": "data/gsm8k/",

  "max_response_length": 1024,
  "max_prompt_length": 1024,
  "temperature": 0.5,

  "num_generations": 8,
  "max_completion_length": 1024,
  "learning_rate": 7e-06,
  "gradient_accumulation_steps": 1,
  "run_id": "run_1780295883",
  "backend": "verl",
  "entropy_coeff": 0.001,
  "kl_coef": 0.1,
  "train_batch_size": 16,
  "ppo_mini_batch_size": 16,

  "_tuning_changes": {

      "from": 5e-06,
      "to": 7e-06,
      "reason": "R3=0.883, gap 0.017"
    },
    "temperature": {
      "from": 0.3,
      "to": 0.5,
      "reason": "More exploration diversity"
    },
    "seed": {
      "from": 44,
      "to": 46
    }
  },
  "resolved_num_gpus": 4,
  "resolved_gpu_type": "GPU 0: NVIDIA A800-SXM4-80GB (UUID: GPU-93b1e36e-f493-1925-ef5a-dbedb6d72f95)"
}

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/../../../.." && pwd)"
cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
MODEL_PATH=/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct
TRAIN_FILE="${PROJECT_ROOT}/data/gsm8k/train_256.parquet"
VAL_FILE="${PROJECT_ROOT}/data/gsm8k/test_32.parquet"
CUSTOM_REWARD="${PROJECT_ROOT}/custom_rewards/gsm8k_reward.py"
echo "=== R5: lr=7e-6 temp=0.5 n=8 ppo_ep=2 ==="
exec python3 -m verl.trainer.main_ppo \
    algorithm.adv_estimator=grpo algorithm.use_kl_in_reward=False algorithm.kl_ctrl.kl_coef=0.1 \
    data.train_files="['${TRAIN_FILE}']" data.val_files="['${VAL_FILE}']" \
    data.train_batch_size=16 data.max_prompt_length=1024 data.max_response_length=1024 \
    data.filter_overlong_prompts=True data.truncation='error' \
    actor_rollout_ref.model.path="$MODEL_PATH" \
    actor_rollout_ref.model.use_remove_padding=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.model.enable_gradient_checkpointing=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.optim.lr=7e-6 actor_rollout_ref.actor.ppo_mini_batch_size=16 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.ppo_epochs=2 actor_rollout_ref.actor.use_dynamic_bsz=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.ppo_max_token_len_per_gpu=16384 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.use_kl_loss=False actor_rollout_ref.actor.entropy_coeff=0.001 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.fsdp_config.param_offload=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.fsdp_config.optimizer_offload=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.name=vllm actor_rollout_ref.rollout.tensor_model_parallel_size=1 \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.gpu_memory_utilization=0.6 \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.n=8 actor_rollout_ref.rollout.temperature=0.5 \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.log_prob_use_dynamic_bsz=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.log_prob_max_token_len_per_gpu=16384 \
    actor_rollout_ref.ref.log_prob_use_dynamic_bsz=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.ref.log_prob_max_token_len_per_gpu=16384 \
    actor_rollout_ref.ref.fsdp_config.param_offload=True \
    reward.reward_manager.source=register reward.reward_manager.name=naive \
    reward.custom_reward_function.path="${CUSTOM_REWARD}" \
    reward.custom_reward_function.name=compute_score \
    trainer.balance_batch=True trainer.logger='["console"]' \
    trainer.project_name=verl_grpo_gsm8k trainer.experiment_name=qwen2.5-7b-gsm8k-r101-r5 \
    trainer.n_gpus_per_node=4 trainer.nnodes=1 trainer.save_freq=999 trainer.test_freq=10 \
    trainer.total_epochs=1 "$@"
